name: Plum Duff
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Well drained, cut-up, pitted cooked prunes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat well 2 eggs.
2. Blend in 1 cup brown sugar.
3. Pour into a well greased 1 quart mold.
4. Steam for 1 hour.
5. Serve hot with Creamy sauce or whipped cream.
Time: Steaming - 1 hour
Amount: 8 servings
I put the filled mold into my pressure cooker and steam without the vent on for 1 hour. For serving, I pour heated brandy over the pudding and flame.
Creamy Sauce:
1. Beat 1 egg until foamy.
2. Blend in 1/2 cup melted butter, 1 1/2 cups sifted confectioners' sugar, and 1 tsp vanilla.
3. Fold in 1 cup whipping cream, whipped stiff.
4. Cool.
